title: Redstone Tools
description: Turn redstone into powerful tools with this innovative mod!
body:
Mod Redstone Stuff - Forge 1.20.1

Dive into a world where redstone is no longer just for powering your circuits! With the Redstone Stuff mod, harness the power of redstone to craft new tools, weapons, and now a full set of armor, combining strength and style.

Main Features
New Redstone Tools:

Redstone Pickaxe: Increased efficiency for fast mining.

Redstone Axe: Chop wood like never before.

Redstone Sword: A sleek and formidable weapon for your battles.

New Redstone Armor:

A full armor set (helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots) offering advanced protection and special abilities. Transform into a true redstone master, both defensively and offensively.

Custom Crafting Recipes: Discover ingenious recipes to craft these revolutionary items using redstone.

Unique and Immersive Design: Each tool and piece of armor is designed to seamlessly integrate with the visual style and mechanics of Minecraft.

Alpha Version

The mod is currently in Alpha, which means it's still under development. Changes, balancing adjustments, and improvements are planned for future updates to further enhance your gaming experience.

Compatibility

This mod is designed for Forge 1.20.1 and works perfectly with other Forge mods.

Why Adopt It?

If you're a redstone enthusiast or a player looking to enrich the Minecraft experience with innovative and powerful equipment, Redstone Stuff is for you. Make redstone your greatest ally and become invincible with the full redstone armor set!

Download and Installation

Download the mod file.

Place it in the "mods" folder of your Forge installation.

Launch the game and enjoy the new tools and armor!

Player's Note

Due to its Alpha status, your feedback and suggestions are valuable to help refine and improve this mod. Feel free to share your ideas!
